command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Move billing item BI00018 from C0249 to C2753
UPDATE billing_items SET customerExternalId = 'C2753' WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0249';

-- Move the service from C0249 to C2753
UPDATE services SET customerExternalId = 'C2753', customerName = 'Zambrero - Cronulla' WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0249';

-- Move locations from C0249 to C2753
UPDATE locations SET customerExternalId = 'C2753', customerName = 'Zambrero - Cronulla' WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0249';

-- Merge contact info from C0249 into C2753 (add xeroContactName and xeroAccountNumber)
UPDATE customers c2753 
JOIN customers c0249 ON c0249.externalId = 'C0249'
SET 
  c2753.xeroContactName = COALESCE(NULLIF(c2753.xeroContactName, ''), c0249.xeroContactName, c0249.name),
  c2753.xeroAccountNumber = COALESCE(NULLIF(c2753.xeroAccountNumber, ''), c0249.xeroAccountNumber),
  c2753.customerType = 'retail_offering'
WHERE c2753.externalId = 'C2753';

-- Verify the result
SELECT externalId, name, customerType, xeroContactName FROM customers WHERE externalId = 'C2753';
stdout:
externalId	name	customerType	xeroContactName
C2753	Zambrero - Cronulla	retail_offering	Zambrero Cronulla
